name: KiCAD MCP

smoke_status.note: Node stdio MCP initialize/tools-list smoke passed with workspace-local KiCad Python user-site .pth injection.

backend_policy: auto: use KiCad IPC when UI server is available, otherwise use SWIG/file-based backend where supported
sipi_use_cases: Create SI/PI example PCB projects from wiki/spec requirements
Apply net classes, controlled-width routing constraints, and DRC rules
Place decoupling capacitors and power/ground via structures
Create copper pours, stitching vias, and differential pair routes
Export board facts as evidence for PyAEDT/ADS extraction workflow
verification: npm run build in KiCAD MCP repo
Manual UI test: open KiCad, enable IPC API Server, then ask MCP to run check_kicad_ui if available
